description: Domain registration, DNS hosting, and SSL/TLS certificate issuance services.

entries.name: Cloudflare DNS
entries.summary: Fast, free authoritative DNS hosting with built-in DDoS protection and analytics.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited domains on free DNS, free SSL/TLS, free DDoS protection.

entries.name: Let's Encrypt
entries.summary: Free, automated, open certificate authority issuing domain-validated TLS certificates, used by most of the web.
entries.freeTier: Completely free, unlimited certificates, automated renewal via ACME protocol.

entries.name: ZeroSSL
entries.summary: Alternative free SSL certificate provider with a web dashboard and ACME support.
entries.freeTier: Free 90-day certificates with manual or automated renewal.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans add longer validity and wildcard support.

entries.name: Cloudflare Registrar
entries.summary: Domain registration at wholesale cost with no markup, bundled with Cloudflare's DNS and security features.
entries.freeTier: No markup on domain pricing (you pay registry cost only, no add-on fees).

entries.name: Namecheap
entries.summary: Popular domain registrar with free WHOIS privacy and DNS management included on most TLDs.
entries.freeTier: Free DNS management and WHOIS privacy guard with domain purchase.

entries.name: DuckDNS
entries.summary: Free dynamic DNS service for giving a home server or self-hosted project a stable subdomain.
entries.freeTier: Free subdomains under duckdns.org with dynamic IP updates.

entries.name: Freenom (historical)
entries.summary: Historically offered free domains on select TLDs (.tk, .ml, .ga, .cf, .gq); service availability has fluctuated.
entries.freeTier: Previously free domains on certain ccTLDs; verify current registration status before relying on this.
entries.notes: Service availability and trustworthiness have been inconsistent; double-check current status before use.

entries.name: DNSimple
entries.summary: DNS management and domain registration with a clean API, popular for automating DNS-as-code workflows.
entries.freeTier: 30-day free trial; no perpetual free tier for paid plans.
